question: Over motor fuel revenue years 2013-2023, which state (excluding DC) has the 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate? I'm researching counties in that state, excluding the most populous city of that state, and campgrounds in forest preserves, which counties have at least 3 campgrounds in state parks, 6 farmers markets, and 40 endangered species, while also recording between 800,000 and 2 million state park visitors in 2019 and receiving $10M-$35M in lottery aid for education in the program fiscal year (within 2017-2022) that has the highest total federal share obligated for funded projects under the Hazard Mitigation Assistance grant programs. For the county within the set with the highest violent crime count in that same fiscal year, in what year was the oldest covered shopping mall built in its county seat? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing federalShareObligated by programFy for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 48932227.55 in 2020.
1.subquestion: Which program fiscal year from 2017-2022 has the highest total federal share obligated for funded projects under the Hazard Mitigation Assistance grant programs? (Sum federalShareObligated by programFy and select the maximum.)

2.fact: Across MMFR years 2013-2023, New York's average gasoline tax rate is 25.5045, which is the 24th-highest among states (excluding DC and Federal Tax) in the motor fuel tax dataset.
2.subquestion: Across MMFR years 2013-2023, which state (excluding DC and Federal Tax) has the 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate in the motor fuel tax dataset?

3.fact: New York City is the most populous city in the United States and is located at the southern tip of New York State.
3.subquestion: What city is located at the southern tip of <node_2 answer> and is the most populous city in the United States?

4.fact: Per the NY State Parks dataset, Jefferson County has 13 campgrounds in state parks outside the Adirondack/Catskill preserves. Tompkins County has 3 state parks.
4.subquestion: Which counties in <node_2 answer> (excluding the counties that make up <node_3 answer>) have at least 3 campgrounds in state parks outside the Adirondack and Catskill Forest Preserves?

5.fact: Per the NY farmers markets dataset, Jefferson County has 6 farmers markets. Tompkins County has 7 farmers markets.
5.subquestion: Which counties in <node_2 answer> excluding the counties that make up <node_3 answer> have at least 6 farmers markets?

6.fact: Per the NY Natural Heritage Program biodiversity data, Jefferson County has 48 endangered species. Tompkins County has 56 endangered species.
6.subquestion: Which counties in <node_2 answer> have at least 40 endangered species per the NY Natural Heritage Program? (Filter: NY Listing Status == 'Endangered'; exclude counties that make up <node_3 answer>; count by County; keep >= 40.)

7.fact: In 2019, Jefferson County had total state park attendance of 951,816. Tompkins County had 1,627,981.
7.subquestion: Which counties in <node_2 answer> excluding the counties that make up <node_3 answer> had total state park attendance between 800,000 and 2,000,000 in 2019? (Filter: Year == 2019; sum Attendance by County; exclude <node_3 answer> counties; keep totals between 800,000 and 2,000,000.)

8.fact: In fiscal year 2019-<node_1 answer>, Jefferson County received $30,813,684.49 in lottery aid. Tompkins County received $13,954,664.99.
8.subquestion: Which counties in <node_2 answer> excluding the counties that make up <node_3 answer> received between $10 million and $35 million in lottery aid to education in fiscal year 2019-<node_1 answer>?

9.fact: Jefferson County's county seat is Watertown.
9.subquestion: What is the county seat of Jefferson County (from <intersection of nodes 4-8>)?

10.fact: Tompkins County's county seat is Ithaca.
10.subquestion: What is the county seat of Tompkins County (from <intersection of nodes 4-8>)?

11.fact: In <node_1 answer>, Jefferson County had 278 violent crimes and Tompkins County had 170 violent crimes (Violent Count column). Jefferson had more violent crimes (278 > 170).
11.subquestion: Which county had more violent crimes in <node_1 answer>: Jefferson County (seat: <node_9 answer>) or Tompkins County (seat: <node_10 answer>)?

12.fact: It is notable as the first enclosed shopping mall in the United States and has been lauded as a fine example of commercial Greek Revival architecture.
12.subquestion: Which shopping mall is notable as the first enclosed shopping mall in the United States and a fine example of commercial Greek Revival architecture?

13.fact: The Paddock Arcade, the second oldest covered shopping mall, in Watertown, New York, was built in 1850.
13.subquestion: What year was the second oldest covered shopping mall in the United States, after <node_12 answer>, built in <node_9 answer> (the county seat of <node_11 answer>)?

reasoning_chain: HOP 1 (d=1, data.gov year derivation - node 1):
Node 1: Year with highest Hazard Mitigation federal share (2017-2022) -> 2020
Derived year: 2020
HOP 2 (d=1, data.gov):
Node 2: Motor fuel tax dataset -> 2013-2023 average gasoline rate ranks 24th highest among states (excluding DC and Federal Tax) -> New York
HOP 3 (d=1, Wikipedia):
Node 3: NYC page -> most populous U.S. city located at the southern tip of New York State -> New York City
HOP 4 (d=5, data.gov intersection - nodes 4-8 all independent):
Node 4: State parks >=3 (outside preserves) -> {Jefferson (13), St. Lawrence (5), Tompkins (3), Suffolk (3), Otsego (3), Cayuga (3)}
Node 5: Farmers markets >=6 -> {Monroe (68), Erie (37), Nassau (20), ..., Jefferson (6), Tompkins (7), ... 36 counties total}
Node 6: Endangered species >=40 -> {Suffolk (165), Nassau (100), ..., Jefferson (48), Tompkins (56), ... 26 counties total}

Node 7: Park attendance 800K-2M in 2019 -> {Tompkins (1,627,981), Cattaraugus (1,521,210), Rockland (1,215,455), Erie (1,157,497), Schuyler (1,037,138), Jefferson (951,816), Livingston/Wyoming (841,681)}
Node 8: Lottery aid $10M-$35M in 2019-<node_1 answer> -> {Chautauqua ($34.57M), ..., Jefferson ($30.81M), ..., Tompkins ($13.95M), ... 29 counties total}
Intersection(4,5,6,7,8) -> {Jefferson, Tompkins}
HOP 5 (d=2, Wikipedia - nodes 9-10 BOTH depend on Hop 4 intersection):
Node 9: Jefferson County Wikipedia -> county seat is Watertown
Node 10: Tompkins County Wikipedia -> county seat is Ithaca
Result: {Watertown, Ithaca} - the county seats of the two qualifying counties
HOP 6 (d=1, data.gov comparative - node 11 compares both counties from same dataset):
Node 11: Violent crimes <node_1 answer> (from rates dataset) -> Jefferson (278) vs Tompkins (170)
Comparative: 278 > 170 -> Jefferson has more violent crimes -> county seat is Watertown
HOP 7 (d=2, Wikipedia - nodes 12-13):
Node 12: Westminster Arcade is the first enclosed shopping mall in the United States and a fine example of commercial Greek Revival architecture.
Node 13: Paddock Arcade in Watertown was built in 1850 and is the second oldest covered shopping mall.
Final answer: 1850
